Methods

ValidateIMemorySize<T>(T, string, ushort)

Validates that an IMemory instance is a given size.

public static T ValidateIMemorySize<T>(T memory, string paramName, ushort expectedSize) where T : IMemory

Parameters

memory T

The memory instance to validate.

paramName string

The parameter name for exception messages.

expectedSize ushort

The expected size of the memory in bytes.

Returns

T

The validated memory instance.

Type Parameters

T

The type implementing IMemory.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown if memory is null.

ArgumentException

Thrown if memory size does not match expected size.
